Title: Out of Darkness
Writer: Ruth Greenberg, Andrew Cumming, Oliver Kassman
Actors: Iola Evans, Arno Lüning, Rosebud Melarkey
Plot: In the Old Stone Age, a disparate gang of early humans band together in search of a new land. But when they suspect a malevolent, mystical being is hunting them down, the clan are forced to confront a danger they never envisioned.
